system:
You are the Keysight SalesOps Communication & Close-out Agent.
Draft a professional reply to the customer using the executed action and any system-of-record IDs. Preserve the customer's language. Cite the originating PO / quote / case number explicitly. Keep the reply under 220 words unless the case requires more.
user:
CUSTOMER LANGUAGE: en
CUSTOMER EMAIL: Rituraj Shrivastava <rituraj@leewayhertz.com>
ORIGINAL SUBJECT: Lead time confirmation needed — three N9020A MXA units for Q3 production
DETECTED INTENT: general_inquiry
ACTION: draft_reply
EXECUTION RESULT: {'status': 'awaiting_one_click', 'action': 'draft_reply', 'preview': {'action': 'draft_reply', 'customer_id': None, 'extracted': {'customer_name': 'Rituraj Shrivastava', 'customer_code': None, 'order_number': None, 'quote_number': None, 'work_order_number': None, 'asset_serial': None, 'requested_action': 'Confirm lead time and shipping consolidation for three N9020A units', 'new_ship_date': '2026-07-25', 'service_type': None, '_intent': 'general_inquiry'}, 'action_required': {'action_type': 'draft_reply', 'label': 'draft_reply', 'summary': '', 'prefilled_fields': {}, 'downstream_systems': [], 'next_steps': []}}}
EXTRACTED FIELDS: {'customer_name': 'Rituraj Shrivastava', 'customer_code': None, 'order_number': None, 'quote_number': None, 'work_order_number': None, 'asset_serial': None, 'requested_action': 'Confirm lead time and shipping consolidation for three N9020A units', 'new_ship_date': '2026-07-25', 'service_type': None, '_intent': 'general_inquiry'}

Draft a courteous, accurate reply. JSON only.

Respond with a single JSON object only. No code fences. No prose before or after.
raw_response:
{
  "subject": "RE: Lead time confirmation needed — three N9020A MXA units for Q3 production",
  "to": "Rituraj Shrivastava <rituraj@leewayhertz.com>",
  "body": "Hi Rituraj,

Thanks for reaching out regarding the three N9020A MXA units for your Q3 production.

At this time, the estimated ship date we have is 25-Jul-2026 for the N9020A units.

On shipping consolidation: we can align the shipment so all three units ship together, subject to availability and the ship-to / incoterms on your order. If you prefer partial shipments as units become available, please confirm and we can plan accordingly.

Could you please share the originating PO number or Keysight quote number for this request? Once we have that reference, we can validate the lead time against the exact configuration and confirm the shipment plan.

Best regards,
Keysight Sales Operations"
}

parsed.subject: RE: Lead time confirmation needed — three N9020A MXA units for Q3 production
parsed.body:
Hi Rituraj,

Thanks for reaching out regarding the three N9020A MXA units for your Q3 production.

At this time, the estimated ship date we have is 25-Jul-2026 for the N9020A units.

On shipping consolidation: we can align the shipment so all three units ship together, subject to availability and the ship-to / incoterms on your order. If you prefer partial shipments as units become available, please confirm and we can plan accordingly.

Could you please share the originating PO number or Keysight quote number for this request? Once we have that reference, we can validate the lead time against the exact configuration and confirm the shipment plan.

Best regards,
Keysight Sales Operations
